focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Ted begins as a boy adrift in identity, shattered by the revelation of his biological parents' death and a lifetime of familial rejection, which ignites a turbulent quest for belonging and power. He ascends through rebellion and reinvention, only to confront the hollowness of success, ultimately choosing authenticity over empire—mending broken bonds, reclaiming his legacy on his own terms, and sailing into an uncertain but hopeful future with Julie.
